Since the 1930s — A Private Family Legacy

A Legacy of Unity,
Worn Across
Generations

Since the 1930s, our family has honoured a private tradition of strength, continuity, and quiet elegance. Today, we invite discerning women to carry forward this living heritage.

What began as an intimate family ritual has become a symbol of enduring bonds between generations of remarkable women. Each Generation Bracelet is a timeless heirloom — individually crafted, deeply personal, and meant to be passed on with love.

Our Heritage

Nearly a Century
of Private Tradition

Since the 1930s, the women of our family have upheld a tradition of quiet strength and enduring connection. On the occasion of their twenty-first year, they receive a Generation Bracelet — crafted with reverence, engraved with care.

These bracelets have accompanied our family through decades of celebration, resilience, and unity — worn at the gatherings that define a life.

"Worn at significant family gatherings, they serve as a tangible reminder of the powerful bond shared between generations of remarkable women."
Discover Our Story
Heritage & Origin

Our Story

Since the 1930s, the women of our family have upheld a tradition of quiet strength and enduring connection. On meaningful milestones in life, particularly their twenty-first year, they receive a Generation Bracelet — a personal piece of jewellery crafted in gold or silver, engraved with care, and tailored to reflect their individual spirit.

These bracelets have accompanied our family through decades of celebration, resilience, and unity. Worn at significant family gatherings, they serve as a tangible reminder of the powerful bond shared between mothers, daughters, and generations of remarkable women.

What was once a private family legacy has evolved into something we now wish to share with women and families who value heritage, craftsmanship, and the profound beauty of continuity.

We create each Generation Bracelet with the same reverence and attention to detail that has defined our family for nearly a century — so that you too may wear a piece of history, and one day pass it forward.

1930s
The first Generation Bracelet is gifted within our family — a quiet promise between a mother and her daughter on the occasion of her twenty-first year.
Mid Century
The tradition endures through decades of change. Each bracelet engraved with a new name, a new date — the family story growing richer with every generation.
Today
What was private becomes an invitation. We welcome discerning women and families to begin their own living legacy.
✦

"This is more than jewellery. It is a bridge between generations — an expression of strength, grace, and the quiet power of women united through time."

Craftsmanship & Design

The Generation
Bracelet

Each Generation Bracelet is a singular expression of personal and familial legacy. Meticulously handcrafted, no two are ever identical.

Available in 18k yellow gold, rose gold, or sterling silver. Choose a refined narrow width or a bolder presence. Engraved by hand with names, dates, or symbols that speak to the wearer's unique journey.

More than an ornament, the Generation Bracelet is a private testament — a piece that connects past, present, and future.

The Craft

Where Heritage
Meets Craft

Every Generation Bracelet and ring is created by hand, in close dialogue with those who commission it. The process is unhurried, intimate, and deeply considered.

We work with artisan goldsmiths who share our belief that a piece of jewellery should carry meaning — not merely beauty.

Commission Yours
I
Material
18k yellow gold, 18k rose gold, or sterling silver. Each metal selected for its character — its warmth, its weight, its way of catching light across a lifetime.
II
Engraving
Names, dates, initials, or symbols — etched by hand with precision. The engraving is as unique as the woman who wears it; as enduring as the bond it represents.
III
Commission
All creations are made to order through private consultation. We do not offer ready-to-wear pieces. Each piece is a considered collaboration between maker and client.
Private Commission

Collections

Each piece in our collection is a limited expression of the Generation legacy — available by private commission only.

Bracelets
18k Rose Gold · Wide Cuff · Hand Engraved
The Heritage Cuff
This Generation Bracelet in 18k rose gold, with a wide cuff profile and custom engraving, embodies strength and grace. Reserved for those who wear their story with intention.
Request Private Viewing
Gold & Silver · Both Metals · Paired Set
The Paired Legacy
Gold and silver worn together — the complete story in metal. Each cuff represents a generation; together they speak of lineage, of continuity, of women who carry their history on their skin.
Request Private Viewing
18k Rose Gold · Intimate Setting
The Classic Cuff
A single engraved cuff in rose gold — worn against silk, against skin. Intimate, personal, and profoundly quietly beautiful. The bracelet as it was always intended to be.
Begin Your Legacy
Sterling Silver · Wide Profile · Engraved
The Silver Cuff
In sterling silver — cool, luminous, and enduring. Engraved to mark a date, a name, or a promise that will outlast a lifetime.
Begin Your Legacy
Rings
18k Rose Gold · Wide Band
The Gold Generation Ring
A wide band in 18k rose gold — polished, warm, and quietly commanding. Worn alone as a statement or stacked as part of the full Generation collection.
Request Private Viewing
Sterling Silver · Wide Band
The Silver Generation Ring
The Generation Ring in sterling silver — cool and luminous against the skin. Worn alone with understated elegance or alongside the cuff as a complete legacy set.
Request Private Viewing
Gold & Silver · Stacked Set
The Stacked Ring Set
Gold and silver bands worn together — a quiet symphony of metals. The stacked set is the full expression of the Generation ring language: layered, intentional, and deeply personal.
Begin Your Legacy
Cuffs & Rings · Complete Set
The Complete Legacy Set
The full Generation collection — cuffs and rings in gold and silver, worn together. A living heirloom commissioned for a milestone or built piece by piece across the years.
Begin Your Legacy
Bespoke
Your Vision · Any Metal · Any Profile
Bespoke Commission
For those whose story calls for something entirely unique. We welcome the opportunity to create a piece — bracelet, ring, or set — conceived entirely around your family, your language, your moment in time.
Every detail is yours to choose. We simply make it real.
Begin Your Legacy

All creations are made to order with the utmost discretion. Pricing and availability are provided upon private consultation. We welcome enquiries from women and families who value heritage, craftsmanship, and the profound beauty of continuity.

Private Enquiry

Begin Your
Legacy

We welcome the opportunity to create a Generation Bracelet or Ring that is meaningful to you or your family. Every commission begins with a private conversation.

"Each enquiry is an honour. We give every commission our complete and undivided attention."
Private Consultation
We begin with an unhurried conversation to understand your story, your intention, and your vision for the piece.
Design & Engraving
Together we select the piece, metal, profile, and engraving. Every detail is considered. Nothing is rushed.
Creation & Delivery
Your piece is handcrafted and delivered with full discretion, presented in our signature keepsake packaging.
Enquiry Form
All enquiries are handled with complete confidentiality.
Reach Us

Contact

We welcome correspondence from women and families who feel drawn to the JM Generation legacy. Every enquiry receives our complete and personal attention.
